name: a fun CLI wizard/gateway to launch Claude Code with OpenCode
snippet: I put together opencode-starter, a small npm CLI that walks you through setup and launches Claude Code pointed at OpenCode Zen or Go. Use Claude Code or Codex with an OpenCode Go subscription - Reddit Is it possible to use Opencode Zen Go with Claude Code CLI? - Reddit More results from www.reddit.com Missing: dopejs GoZen

install Install the GitHub agent. This sets up the necessary GitHub Actions workflow and guides you through the configuration process.
